# Superstore Sales - Excel Solution Walkthrough

## Project Overview

This project analyzes Superstore Sales data for various regions across Canada. The work covers two activities: structured Excel formatting and cleanup (Activity 1), and profitability analysis by product sub-category and region (Activity 2).

## Files

| File | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `superstore_sales (1).csv` | Raw dataset |
| `superstore_sales_solution.xlsx` | Excel solution workbook |
| `Superstore_Solution_Walkthrough.pptx` | Presentation deck (10 slides) |
| `README.md` | This file |

## Tools Used

- Microsoft Excel (formatting, pivot tables, conditional formatting)
- Python / PptxGenJS (presentation generation)

---

## Key Findings

### Activity 1 - Excel Formatting Summary

| Section | Task |
|---------|------|
| Section 1 & 2 | Column widths, header formatting, segment filtering into 4 sheets |
| Section 3 | Frozen headers, hidden columns, rounding, dollar formatting, date reformatting |
| Section 4 | 3-level sorting, top 10% green highlight, profit heat scale |
| Section 5 | Double bottom borders per region, page layout, password protection |

### Activity 2 - Profitability Analysis

| Sub-Category | Recommendation |
|--------------|----------------|
| Copiers, Phones, Accessories | Grow - consistently profitable across regions |
| Tables, Bookcases, Supplies | Review / Discontinue - loss-making |
